violations.text: The menu is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Pasta salad was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Utensils (strainers) in the bar area are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Strainers were inverted during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and freezer have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
Broken glass was observed on floor behind ice bins at the bar. The mop sink was observed with an accumulation of black reside. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
